mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO share_resources (share_id, resource_id, created_at) VALUES
(#{shareId}, #{rid}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT r.id, r.resource_uuid, r.space_id, r.parent_id, r.resource_type, r.name, r.name_normalized, r.extension, r.size_bytes, r.object_id, r.path_cache, r.owner_user_id, r.is_deleted, r.deleted_at, r.created_at, r.updated_at FROM share_resources sr INNER JOIN resources r ON r.id = sr.resource_id WHERE sr.share_id = #{shareId} AND r.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY CASE WHEN r.resource_type = 'folder' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END ASC, r.name_normalized ASC, r.id ASC

SELECT r.id, r.resource_uuid, r.space_id, r.parent_id, r.resource_type, r.name, r.name_normalized, r.extension, r.size_bytes, r.object_id, r.path_cache, r.owner_user_id, r.is_deleted, r.deleted_at, r.created_at, r.updated_at FROM share_resources sr INNER JOIN resources r ON r.id = sr.resource_id WHERE sr.share_id = #{shareId} AND r.resource_uuid = #{resourceUuid} AND r.is_deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
